prompt: Evaluate the procedure sequence and state what must happen before work can continue.
scenario: You are on a manufacturing or assembly floor running standard work with quality gates. The work under review is Standard work execution, part of the Assembly & Fabrication scope. The observed field condition is: step order deviation vs. standard work sheet (video + document = premier multimodal SEQ). The work is actively in progress. Reference material on hand: site standard work, TWI.
title: Sequence check: Standard work execution (production floor)
